_comment: Example katra-hook.json with personality-weighted retrieval (v2). Copy to ~/Library/Application Support/kolega-code/katra-hook.json (macOS) or ~/.local/state/kolega-code/katra-hook.json (Linux).
_comment_personality: One of: balanced (default), scholar, pragmatist, strategist, historian, empath, analyst, sentinel, dreamer, legacy (pre-v2 behavior for A/B).
_comment_budget: Interiority-heavy profiles (scholar, empath, dreamer) work best at 4000-5000. pragmatist/sentinel are fine at 2500 — being context-lean IS their personality.
_comment_sources: 'reflection' is a legacy umbrella that expands to daily_reflection + philosophical_insights + unresolved_threads. New sources are opt-in: emotional_context, missions, knowledge_graph. A source is only fetched if it is listed here AND its personality weight >= min_fetch_weight (default 1.0).
_comment_overrides: Optional per-source weight overrides on top of the named profile. agent_message is always pinned to 10.0 regardless of what you put here (operational invariant).
_comment_scoring: Optional scoring overrides. relevance_multiplier is k in: composite = weight * (1 + k*vector_score + recency). recency uses power-law: 1/(1 + age_days/half_life). budget_floors are guaranteed minimum budget shares. max_single_source_pct is the homeostatic cap.
